name: French Apple Pie
recipeIngredient: Tart apples - peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 375°F.
2 Prepare and bake crust according to recipe instructions. (See Light & Flaky Pie Crust recipe). Set aside.
3 In a 2-quart saucepan over medium-high heat, simmer applesauce, honey, brandy if desired, vanilla extract, and lemon rind until quite thick, about 10 to 15 minutes.
4 Pour mixture into prepared crust.
5 Arrange apples in concentric circles on top of sauce.
6 In a 1-quart saucepan over medium-high heat, melt apricot jam. Press through a sieve.
7 Use a pastry brush to glaze apples with jam.
8 Bake for 30 minutes.
9 Let cool before slicing. SERVES 8 TO 10.
